message:
fix(dns): fail closed on custom nameservers and short-circuit literal IPs

Two fixes to Resolver::lookup_ip():

1. Literal IP short-circuit moved from do_lookup_ip() to lookup_ip(),
   before the cache check. Parsing "127.0.0.1" no longer touches the
   cache or spawns a blocking task.

2. Custom nameservers (non-empty config.nameservers) now return
   DnsError::NotImplemented immediately. Phase 0 uses
   std::net::ToSocketAddrs which ignores configured nameservers, so
   the previous behavior silently fell through to system resolvers
   regardless of configuration. Fail-closed prevents silent misrouting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
